events.description: Voice carries a sense of wistful reminiscence; words: "你我年少相逢，都有凌云之志。" (You and I met young, both with lofty ambitions.) — soft, slightly strained intonation, conveying unresolved regret and nostalgia.

CosyVoice2.text: 你我年少相逢，都有凌云之志。
CosyVoice2.prompt_transcript: 在动画电影长安三万里中，我为李白配音。
